checks.name: npm run lint
checks.details: Exited 0 with seven pre-existing unused-symbol warnings outside the changed files and zero errors.

checks.name: npm run build
checks.details: Next.js 16 production build completed; /songs/geudae-naege-dasi was included in the statically generated song routes.

checks.name: audio-to-score final artifact validation
checks.details: validate_score.py reported OK for the authoritative 11_final_score.json.

checks.name: published notation asset validation
checks.details: MusicXML parses as three parts with 86 measures each; web-display metronome marks are removed; MIDI parses as four tracks with a 245.853-second duration.

checks.name: LAN HTTP access
checks.details: The server listens on TCP *:3100; /songs, /songs/geudae-naege-dasi, the MusicXML asset, and the MIDI asset each returned HTTP 200 through 192.168.0.5.

visual_checks.name: Browser before/after evidence
visual_checks.details: Before evidence: evidence/songs-before-desktop.png, evidence/songs-before-mobile.png, evidence/song-detail-before-desktop.png. After evidence: evidence/songs-after-desktop.png, evidence/songs-after-mobile.png, evidence/song-detail-after-desktop-clean.png, evidence/song-detail-after-mobile.png.

visual_checks.name: Songs representative row and redundancy
visual_checks.details: The new first row uses the same title/artist and feel/section/system hierarchy as sibling rows. No badge, duplicate heading, or extra local label was introduced.

visual_checks.name: Songs available-width fit
visual_checks.details: At 390px, document scrollWidth equals viewport width (390px); the Korean title, artist, Ballad label, ten-section count, and 24-system count wrap without clipping.

visual_checks.name: Full-score representative systems
visual_checks.details: Desktop first, middle, and final evidence files show Melody, Piano RH, Piano LH, chord symbols, section rehearsal labels, and the final barline. The redundant embedded MusicXML title and per-measure tempo marks were removed.

visual_checks.name: Full-score mobile fit
visual_checks.details: At 390px, the score container is 342px wide, rendered SVG pages are 342px wide, document scrollWidth remains 390px, and three staves plus chord/form labels remain visible.

visual_checks.name: Browser runtime and legacy regression
visual_checks.details: Home, Songs, the new detail route, and the existing 기억의 습작 route load with content, no alphaTab alert, and no Next.js error overlay. The legacy AlphaTex chart still renders.

visual_checks.name: Served CSS
visual_checks.details: No reusable semantic CSS class or global theme variable was added; implementation uses existing Tailwind utilities and the existing score CSS module.
